title: Final Mod
description: a powerful mod that provides ultimate weapons
body:
<details>
<summary>Mod Introduction (Machine translation)</summary>
This is a powerful mod that provides ultimate weapons and an invincible defense system. Right-click to instantly clear all entities on the map; Shift + right-click to switch to destruction mode for a more powerful effect. With infinite attack capability, it can unconditionally eliminate vanilla entities and mod entities with low defense; in invincible defense mode, it is completely immune to damage and simultaneously activates the health lock mechanism and disables the camera shake function. The anti-disarming feature ensures that once a weapon is obtained, it is permanently locked, so there's no need to worry about it being taken away. The appearance decoration effects include dynamic rainbow lighning bolts and text styles. Destruction mode can also disable entity spawning, achieving absolute dominance.
</details>

<details>
<summary>模组介绍</summary>
这是一个强大的模组，提供终极武器与无敌防御系统。通过右键攻击可瞬间清除全图生物，Shift+右键切换至毁灭模式可释放更强威力。拥有无限攻击能力，可无差别击杀原版生物及防御低的Mod生物；无限防御状态下完全免疫伤害，并同步开启锁血机制与禁用视角抖动功能。防缴械特性确保武器一旦获取便永久锁定，无须担心被夺走。外观装饰效果包含动态彩雷与文字样式。毁灭模式还可禁用生物生成，实现绝对压制。
</details>
